message.content:
@startuml
actor user
participant app
database firestore

== Create New Case ==
user -> app : press "New Case"
app --> user : show case creation screen
user -> app : enter details, press save
activate app
    app ->> firestore : send CaseTemporary(name, summary)
        activate firestore
            firestore ->> firestore : save
        deactivate firestore
        firestore -->> app : return Case(id, name, summary,\ncreated_at, updated_at, submitted_at, submitted)\n\nupdate local case details
deactivate app
firestore -|-> user : transition to story list\ncase details screen
@enduml
